grant_title: Irene E. & George A. Davis Foundation Grants
project_area: Education - Preschool / Early Learning, Art & Culture, Health & Medicine
demographic_requirements: Nonprofit organizations serving Hampden County, Massachusetts
eligibility_summary: Nonprofit organizations serving Hampden County, Massachusetts, with a focus on early education, health, economic mobility, and arts. Eligible organizations must demonstrate measurable outcomes and a commitment to sustainable change.
